description_long: This is a weathered, upright gravestone made of dark stone, likely granite or marble, set on a rectangular stone base. The headstone features a rounded top and visible signs of aging, including discoloration, moss, and surface erosion. The front face bears faint, partially legible inscriptions, possibly including names and dates, though the text is difficult to read due to wear. The base is composed of two stacked stone slabs, with the lower slab slightly larger and embedded in a patch of reddish-brown earth. The stone's surface is rough and matte, with streaks of white mineral deposits and patches of lichen. The overall appearance suggests it is a traditional grave marker found in older urban cemeteries.
description: A weathered, upright gravestone with a rounded top, dark stone surface, and faint inscriptions, set on a rectangular stone base with visible aging and moss.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded top, faint inscriptions, and most of the weathering and moss on the face.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the smooth, uninscribed back and the layered stone base.
description_view_2: Direct rear view showing the plain, weathered back surface and the full extent of the stone base.
description_view_3: Side-front angled view revealing the thickness of the headstone, the layered base, and partial inscriptions.
